text:
Created attachment 176232
strongswan5.5.1 src/start Makefile.in patch

Built strongswan 5.5.1 on FreeBSD10.3Stable amd64 using libressl and gcc5; and i386 using openssl and gcc5.  starter/Makefile.am patch enclosed.  Please note: not run tested yet (as a long list of ports preceed it)
